MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANDERS, ROCHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF LOTTIE LOVILLE, DECEASED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2009 - CONTINUED TO AUG-21-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDERS, ROCHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTATE OF LOTTIE LOVILLE, DECEASED $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES REASONABLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT EXCEED $7500.00 AND THE DECEDENT WAS WHOLLY AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
